very_drunk.speaker: The Girls
very_drunk.text: The Girls look you up and down. 'Oh honey. You're already halfway there. We can work with that.' One of them smiles in a way that is NOT comforting.

buzzed.speaker: The Girls
buzzed.text: Head start, huh, Dave? Wanna keep the party going?

too_hot.speaker: The Girls
too_hot.text: The Girls look past you nervously. 'Not today. Too many eyes on the street.' They scatter.

cash_noticed.speaker: The Girls
cash_noticed.text: The Girls clock the bulge in your pocket. 'Nice bankroll. The book club has a VIP chapter, you know.'

morning_intro.speaker: The Girls
morning_intro.text: The Girls are doing yoga on someone's lawn. 'It's early, Dave. This is just yoga. The OTHER kind comes later.'

late_afternoon_intro.speaker: The Girls
late_afternoon_intro.text: 'Last chance, Dave. The book club closes at sundown and we have PLANS.'

already_in_cash.speaker: The Girls
already_in_cash.text: They eye the bulge in your pocket. 'Book club just got VIP tier.'

already_in_pyramid.speaker: The Girls
already_in_pyramid.text: 'Saw you talking to Kevin. That poor man. Come, we have real medicine.'

already_in_default.text: The Girls wave. You nod back like you're in a secret club. You kind of are. 'We're heading to the strip mall later,' one whispers. 'Book club, chapter two.'

intro.speaker: The Girls
intro.text: Hey! You're Karen's husband, right? We're heading behind the strip mall. It's... a book club. Kind of.

choices.text: "See what all the fuss is about"

beats.text: They start walking. You follow. Obviously you follow. You think about Karen. Briefly. Then the laundromat goes by, and you don't.

decline.text: The Girls shrug in perfect synchronization. 'Your loss, Dave.' Your name isn't Dave.
